description: A subject is held static on one side of a flat field; one or more elements (an icon and/or a word) appear in the empty side, one after another, timed to the narration.
whenToUse: A reveal / labelling / 'X + attribute' beat: tag a held subject with a term, icon or number as it is spoken (e.g. a person + a green cross + the word 'Albinism').
generalize: Everything is a SLOT: the subject (any person/animal/object), which side holds it, the field (chosen/rotated), and the ordered elements (icon or word). The concrete build is one example, not the definition.
produces: gpt-image-2 PLATE (subject on {subjectSide} third, rest empty flat {field}, no text) as bgUrl; each element = its own gpt-image-2 asset -> icon via rembg, word via magenta color-key -> placed as a timed overlay that hard-appears at its startWord.

field.note: flat field for the plate; choose from palette, rotate vs prevField

subject.note: SHORT plain description of the held subject (no style words); pipeline adds STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE

item.content: for icon: SHORT plain description of the illustrated element; for word: the exact text string
item.voice: for word only: a voice from text-styles (title-bold | label-handwritten)
item.startWord: the narration word this element appears on (timing)
item.xFrac: center X 0..1 in the empty area (reading order left->right)
item.wFrac: width as fraction of canvas (default ~0.12 icon, ~0.22 word)

styleLock: Prepare-Prompt prepends STYLE_BLOCK_IMAGE to the subject + each icon; words are gpt-image-2 lettering (never a font). You write only subject/content/field/voice.
rules: No entrance animation — elements HARD-APPEAR at their startWord (channel style).
Text is gpt-image-2 art in a chosen voice (text-styles.md), never a compositor font.
Field chosen from palette, rotate vs prevField; red is semantic-only.
Vibrance pass applied so output isn't washed-out.
Compose the plate with the empty side reserved for the elements.
